name: Dino Fighter
author: Poki
description: Dino Fighter is an action game where a trip to the dinosaur park turns into a fight for your life! Battle dangerous dinosaurs, collect their bones to earn money, and upgrade your weapons to stay alive. Search for spare parts to repair your helicopter and escape the chaos before it’s too late. Ready to survive the Jurassic nightmare? How to play Dino Fighter? Click or tap to make the choice. Use WASD or the joystick to move. Who created Dino Fighter? Dino Fighter is created by Lumamind. Play their other games on Poki: Mech Bots Arena ! How can I play Dino Fighter for free? You can play Dino Fighter for free on Poki. Can I play Dino Fighter on mobile devices and desktop? Dino Fighter can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
